title: Case Study: Turning clear rules into a reliable trading bot (what actually matters)
author: Consistent_Cable5614
selftext:
I build **custom trading bots** for your exact rules (no templates).

**What I focus on:** risk manager (SL/TP, sizing, circuit breaker), clean order handling, exchange filters, and realistic backtests.

**Deliverable:** production-ready code + brief handover call.

If you have a ruleset you want automated, drop a few lines about entries/exits + venue and I’ll tell you what’s feasible.
